name: Kurversbrug

description: Kurversbrug spans an unusually wide weight range, from Light through Book, Regular, Bold and Black to the heaviest Fat cut, giving designers considerable flexibility across print and screen applications. A dedicated Stencil style extends the family into more expressive territory, suited to poster, signage or identity work that calls for a harder-edged character. The family is available from Retype starting at $42.

name: Lavigne Nova

summary: A serif family split across Display and Text optical sizes, spanning nine weights with matching italics for editorial and long-form use.
description: Lavigne Nova offers two purpose-built optical variants: a Display cut optimised for headlines and large settings, and a Text cut tuned for smaller sizes and body copy. The Display subfamily runs from Thin to Black with italics throughout, while the Text subfamily covers Book to Bold. The result is a coordinated system suited to publication design where both headline and body work need to cohere.

name: Guyot Headline, Text & Press
classification_notes: The three-subfamily structure of Headline, Text and Press, combined with the historical name Guyot referencing the 16th-century French punchcutter Jacques de Guyot, points to a revival of Renaissance or Garamond-era letterforms with optical size differentiation.
summary: A three-subfamily revival drawing on 16th-century French punch-cutting traditions, with distinct optical variants for headline, text and simulated letterpress use.
description: The family divides into three purpose-built subfamilies: Headline runs from Light to Black with italics for display work, Text covers the middle weights for continuous reading, and Press introduces graded variants that mimic the ink spread of letterpress printing. The Press subfamily offers three grades per weight and style, giving designers fine control over apparent heaviness without changing weight. Together the three subfamilies amount to a substantial type system rooted in Renaissance French type history.
foundry_blurb: Retype offer Guyot Headline, Text & Press as a comprehensive serif family with three subfamilies tailored to different uses: Headline for large sizes, Text for body copy, and Press with multiple grades per weight to replicate the visual effect of letterpress printing.
